hero.explore: Explore the exciting and mysterious world of wild animals in anatural setting without leaving your home.

contact.haveQuestion: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you! Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

donation.makeMontly: Make this a monthly recurring gift
donation.name: *Your Name
donation.youWill: You will receive emails from the Online Zoo, including updates and news on the latest discoveries and translations. You can unsubscribe at any time.
donation.saveCard: Save card info for future donations

landing.Website: On our website, using live webcams, fans of all ages can observe various animals. Among them, are Giant pandas, eagles, alligators, forest gorillas, African lions, and others. It is the whole natural world in real-time in front of our cameras.
landing.slidesText: Your $30 could give Lucas a slice of panda cake, made with our secret recipe.
landing.careFor: care for the animals you love
landing.youCan: You can help to look after the animals you love with your gift today
landing.weAre: We are continuously striving to improve the experiences of our future guests. Below you can leave your own feedback, or simply view feedback from past clients.
landing.title3: Bring your food charity — straight to your favorites pets.
landing.text1: Providing our animals with high-quality nutritious diets is just one element of animal care at our Zoo. We do all the best so that our animals can eat food similar to what they might find in their natural habitats while making sure they get the right mix of nutrients, proteins, and vitamins to be happy and healthy. Please help us provide nutritious food for our animals by donating.
landing.text2: You can donate through your credit card without any fees. It is easy and safe. We do not keep donors personal information on an online network. Choose an amount to give and the pets name if needed.
landing.text3: After your donation, the animal receives its favorite foods. You can support your favorite animals or any animal you care about and make a real personal impact. Never doubt that your donation can make a difference even if it is small.
landing.doYouHave: Do you have a special place in your heart for animals? Who are your favorites? Perhaps you would like to donate to special ones or all our pets? We think it is important for you to choose how your donation is used.
landing.theOnlineZoo: The Online Zoo's animal webcams are some of the most famous on the internet. Tune in to watch your favourite animals — live, 24/7!
landing.online: Online Zoo is a nonprofit committed to inspiring awareness and preservation of nature and wild animals in our zoo and worldwide. To continue these efforts, we need your help. We are so grateful to our supporters. All donations, large and small, go a long way to the conservation efforts of our pets.
